positive: Minimalist abstract woodland creature silhouette, specifically a stylized deer with gracefully curved antlers, set against a gradient background of deep sapphire blue transitioning to soft moss green. The deer is rendered in crisp, matte black ink, making it a perfect central graphic for apparel. The composition should be centered and balanced, emphasizing the clean lines of the subject. Use strong contrast and clean edges. Style should evoke modern Scandinavian design, clean vector graphics, high contrast, and nature-inspired motifs. Detailed pattern elements include small, stylized leaves and gentle forest mist suggested by negative space, giving it a sophisticated, wearable art feel. Perfect for textile printing.
